description: Handover must call scripts/create-handover-issue.sh instead of inlining `gh issue create` — prose-level shell blocks get silently skipped (memory feedback_md_instructions_untrustworthy).
Skill must still document `type:handover` so /pickup's label-based filter contract is explicit.
Outcome log section must document that the script writes the log line (so Claude does not hand-write a `pass` line without the `issue={N}` marker — the original bug).
Skill must reference the MD-untrustworthy rationale so future editors understand why the script is mandatory, not optional.
Skill must have a ## Config block pointing at brain-os.config.md so vault_path + gh_task_repo can be resolved

Skill must document the canonical cross-session flow: /handover in current session (creates issue + doc) → sp tab new → /pickup <N> in new tab. No hand-crafted start prompts — pickup reads the issue + handover doc as SSOT.

Skill must document that seeding / ingestion handovers should be framed by source (e.g. 'Seed from Airtable') not output entity (e.g. 'Seed people'). A single pass through one source produces all entity types — splitting by entity hides that fact and forces redundant scans.
